title: lobelia flaccida var. scabripes
intro: Lobelia flaccida var. scabripes, also known as the blue lobelia, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, expectorant, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviating muscle spasms and anxiety. In herbal preparations, Lobelia flaccida var. scabripes is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be avoided in pregnant or breastfeeding women due to potential side effects.
